summary: Iteration 6: Tested typing indicator, review system, unread count, registration, CustomerDashboard, MessagesPage empty states. All backend APIs pass (9/9). All frontend features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor UX note: confirmed bookings with past dates appear in 'Kommende Termine' tab (not 'Vergangene'), because the tab logic splits by status (pending/confirmed = upcoming, cancelled/completed = past). The Bewerten button correctly appears for confirmed past-dated bookings in the Kommende tab. This is by design but could be confusing UX-wise — no action required unless E1 wants to change.

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 tests pass, 1 skipped due to test data setup fixed)

seed_data_creation: Registered test_cust6@inkbook.com (customer, Test1234!) and test_studio6@inkbook.com (studio_owner, Test1234!). Inserted past confirmed booking bk_test_review_6 into MongoDB for ReviewModal testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features all verified: 1) Registration (customer + studio_owner) via POST /api/auth/register ✓ 2) Typing API: POST /api/messages/{id}/typing returns {ok:true}, GET typing-status returns is_typing true/false, expires after 4s ✓ 3) Review API: POST /api/studios/{id}/reviews creates review (needs studio_id in body), duplicate booking_id returns 400 ✓ 4) Unread count: GET /api/messages/unread-count returns {count:0} ✓ 5) CustomerDashboard: stats grid (4 cards), 3 quick actions, Kommende/Vergangene tabs ✓ 6) Bewerten button visible for confirmed past-dated bookings in Kommende tab ✓ 7) ReviewModal: opens with 5 stars (star-1..star-5), textarea, submit button, submits and closes ✓ 8) MessagesPage customer sees 'Buche einen Termin und schreibe dem Studio' ✓ 9) MessagesPage studio_owner sees 'Kunden schreiben dir...' ✓. Test accounts: test_cust6@inkbook.com / Test1234!, test_studio6@inkbook.com / Test1234!
